items.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings

Normally fetching $200 at full price, with some multi-cam bundle kits available on the same page at higher rates, this single-cam package has been regularly dropping to $160 over the last year, with occasional falls further. With the deal here you’re getting an even better 40% markdown from the going rate that saves you $80 at the all-time lowest price we have tracked, making it a great option to add to existing setups or to cover a very specific section of your property for added peace of mind. Head below to learn more about it and some of the other solar security solutions we’ve spotted this week.

items.title: Congress can finally close a mass surveillance loophole — but will they?

A bipartisan coalition of progressive Democrats and members of the hard-right Freedom Caucus say it's long overdue for reform. […]

items.title: Anker SOLIX 72-hour sale offers 6,144Wh expanded F3000 power station bundle at exclusive new $1,994 low, more from $699
items.summary:
Anker SOLIX has launched a 72-hour weekend flash sale that is offering a nice array of varying 1,024Wh to 6,144Wh power station bundles, as well as one such bundle including an EverFrost 2 cooler – and the best part is our exclusive bonus savings code for even better prices! At the top of this capacity range is Anker’s SOLIX F3000 Portable Power Station with an expansion battery dropping down to $1,994.05 shipped, after using our exclusive code 9TO5DEALS5 at checkout, beating its Amazon storefront pricing by $206. You’ll see it listed here with a $4,498 MSRP, however, the brand has mostly kept it from going higher than $2,699 since mid-November, with it only spiking up to the full price once in 2026. Sales events like these often see it dropped between $2,299 to $2,099, with occasional short-term cuts to $1,999. For this weekend only, by using our exclusive code, you’re getting the absolute best price we have tracked in its history, giving you a major backup power companion for devices and appliances at $705 off the going rate and $2,504 off the MSRP. If you’d prefer just the 3,072Wh station on its own, you can find it down at $1,329 shipped directly (using our code), and $71 higher in price at Amazon. Head below to see all the flash deals while they last.
